---
title: "Query Garden Example"
author: "Nakul R. Padalkar"
format: html
filters:
  - query-garden
query-garden:
  databases:
    - name: hr
      sql-file-path: "hr.sql"
---

## Option-driven SQL block

```{.sql}
#| query-garden: true
#| db: hr
#| dialect: postgresql
select * from regions;
```

## Chunk-registered database

```{.sql}
#| query-garden: true
#| db: hr-preview
#| sql-file-path: hr.sql
#| editable: false
#| dialect: mysql
#| output-location: column
select first_name, last_name, job_id
from employees
limit 5;
```

## Legacy class-based form

```{.sql .interactive .hr}
select region_id, region_name
from regions
limit 2;
```
